successCriteria.description: src/modules/balance/balance.service.ts exists and exports BalanceService class implementing IBalanceService.
tests/unit/modules/balance/balance.service.test.ts exists and contains Jest tests for all public methods of BalanceService.

BalanceService.initializeBalance validates employee existence via EmployeeService.getEmployeeById, validates leave type policy via PolicyService.getPolicyByLeaveType, creates balance via IBalanceRepository.create, and writes audit log via IAuditRepository.createAuditLog, all within a single database transaction.
BalanceService.updateBalance validates policy constraints (max days, negative balance) before updating, and writes audit log, all within a single database transaction.
src/modules/audit/audit.model.ts exists and exports AuditLog and CreateAuditLogDto interfaces.
src/modules/audit/audit.repository.ts exists and exports IAuditRepository interface and AuditRepository class.
ARCHITECTURE.md is updated to document the new Audit module (AuditLog entity, IAuditRepository) if not already present.

constraints: Repository pattern: All database access goes through repository interfaces (IBalanceRepository, IAuditRepository).
Audit records: All state-changing operations (initializeBalance, updateBalance) write an audit record via IAuditRepository.
Input validation: Validate inputs before processing (employee existence, policy constraints).
No sensitive data in logs: Never log passwords, tokens, PII, or financial data.
Error handling: No unhandled promise rejections. All async errors are caught and handled.
outOfScope: Creating EmployeeService, PolicyService, IBalanceRepository, LeaveBalance model (already exist from prior phases).
Creating any API routes or controllers.
Implementing leave request lifecycle (submit, approve, reject).
Phase 7 — Notification and Audit models and repositories beyond the audit model/repository created here.
Phase 10 — Wire services, create routes and controllers.

ambiguities.description: ARCHITECTURE.md location and format not specified; unclear if it exists or needs to be created.
options: Assume ARCHITECTURE.md exists at project root and update it
